High-Risk Merchant Accounts

High-risk businesses often face challenges when applying for traditional merchant accounts. Banks may decline applications due to industry type, chargeback ratios, or regulatory concerns.

At FX Clearing Hub, we specialize in securing merchant accounts for high-risk industries.

Why Businesses Are Declined

  • High chargeback potential
  • Industry classification (forex, gaming, crypto)
  • Cross-border transactions
  • Regulatory complexity

Our Solution

We connect you with acquiring banks that understand your business model.

  • Offshore and international accounts
  • High approval optimization
  • Multi-currency capabilities
  • Scalable processing limits

Benefits

  • Reliable payment processing
  • Global customer reach
  • Reduced downtime
  • Improved transaction approval rates
